fault_hypothesis: The simple integer truncation on line 66 discards the fractional parts of the planned allocations. This causes the sum of the final allocations to be less than the total inventory when the division is uneven.

constraints.intent: The sum of integer allocations must equal the total available inventory.
The sum of the computed floating-point allocations should be equal to the total.
The sum of truncated parts should not be less than the truncation of the sum of the original parts.
The sum of the returned allocations must equal the total inventory.
